title: AI Expressionist Portrait
description: Creates an emotionally charged expressionist painted portrait.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into an emotionally charged expressionist painted portrait. Preserve the number of people, recognizable identity, key facial landmarks, pose, framing, and essential scene context. Use energetic visible brushstrokes, deliberately intensified but coherent facial expression, slightly angular forms, dramatic directional lighting, textured impasto, and a bold palette of saturated complementary colors. Let the background echo the mood through rhythmic painted shapes while keeping the subject dominant and recognizable. Rendering contract: Use the input image as visual ground truth. Keep the exact number of subjects and their left-to-right order, relative scale, pose, gaze, interaction, and key props. For every visible person, retain recognizable face geometry, age range, skin tone, hairstyle, and distinguishing features in a style-appropriate form; do not beautify, age, or swap identity unless explicitly requested. Preserve the source aspect ratio, camera viewpoint, and all important content inside the frame unless this effect explicitly calls for a different layout. Apply the transformation consistently to the subjects, clothing, props, and environment. Return one coherent finished image, not a before-and-after comparison, split screen, or unintended collage; use multiple frames or a decorative border only when this effect explicitly requests them. Include no readable text, letters, numerals, logos, signatures, watermarks, or interface elements unless explicitly requested.
negative_prompt: text, captions, logos, watermarks, signatures, extra people, missing people, unrecognizable subject, grotesque facial distortion, random facial features, duplicate eyes, duplicate face, malformed hands, extra fingers, duplicate limbs, photorealism, smooth airbrush, glossy 3D render, flat emotion, pastel sweetness, blurry, low quality, identity drift, face swap, altered age, altered skin tone, wrong subject count, duplicated subject, merged subjects, inconsistent transformation, partial transformation, before-and-after, split screen, unintended collage, accidental crop, cut-off face, malformed anatomy, broken hands, fused fingers, extra limbs, incoherent perspective, floating objects, random text, gibberish letters, numerals, logo, watermark, signature, interface elements
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. anxious blue and orange mood, heavier impasto...
